data.id: TR-EVASION-001: Process from Staging Path Loading ntdll Directly (PEB Walking)
data.name: TR-EVASION-001: Process from Staging Path Loading ntdll Directly (PEB Walking)
data.description: Detects processes launched from attacker staging paths that directly import ntdll functions like RtlGetCurrentPeb. Attackers use PEB walking to resolve API addresses without calling GetProcAddress (avoiding IAT-based detection). Core technique in shellcode loaders, Cobalt Strike beacons, and position-independent code. Score=100, MalCount=13. Observable via process start events from Temp, AppData, Downloads, ProgramData, or Public directories.
data.contents: (process.path contains '\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\AppData\Local\Temp\' OR process.path contains '\Downloads\' OR process.path contains '\ProgramData\' OR process.path contains '\Public\')
